basic_details.job_title: IIT Kharagpur Outreach Teaching Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Kharagpur (IIT Kharagpur) has published the Outreach Teaching Fellow Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 2 Outreach Teaching Fellow positions. Candidates holding an M.Tech in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Data Science or equivalent are eligible to apply via email through the official website https://www.iitkgp.ac.in. Preference will be given to candidates with a Ph.D. in Computer Science or related fields, along with expertise in AI, Machine Learning, Python, and ML frameworks. The age limit has not been specified in the official no

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech in CS/AI/Data Science or equivalent.
qualification.details: Outreach Teaching Fellow: M.Tech in CS /AI/Data Science or equivalent.

salary_details.pay_scale: Up to Rs. 1,00,000/- per month based on merit.
salary_details.details: Up to Rs. 1,00,000/- per month based on merit.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on CV Further selection process (details to be communicated) Verification of original certificates
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Kharagpur Outreach Teaching Fellow Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download IIT Kharagpur Outreach Teaching Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download IIT Kharagpur Outreach Teaching Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Outreach Teaching Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 21-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech degree in Computer Science (CS), Artificial Intelligence (AI), or Data Science, or an equivalent qualification. A PhD in a related field is desirable.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Outreach Teaching Fellow role?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Outreach Teaching Fellow position at IIT Kharagpur.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Outreach Teaching Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidate can receive a salary of up to Rs. 1,00,000/- per month, determined based on their merit and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates need to apply by sending their detailed CV via email to [email protected] with the subject line "Application for Outreach Teaching Fellow".

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Outreach Teaching Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their CV, followed by further selection stages, and finally, verification of original certificates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Outreach Teaching Fellow position?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job opportunity at IIT Kharagpur.

faq.question: Q9. What additional skills or knowledge are considered desirable for this role?
faq.answer: Desirable qualifications include a PhD in Computer Science or related subjects, strong knowledge of AI and Machine Learning concepts, proficiency in Python, and familiarity with ML frameworks.

faq.question: Q10. Where is IIT Kharagpur located?
faq.answer: IIT Kharagpur is located in Kharagpur, West Bengal. The recruitment is for the Continuing Education & Technology department.
